anatomySection.heading: Know Your Muscles
anatomySection.description: Understanding body anatomy is the key to performing exercises correctly and preventing injuries.
anatomySection.tipDescription: The muscular system of the leg and the skeletal system of the leg are closely connected. For effective calf training, first prepare the thigh muscles with 4 sets, then target the calves with 16-10 descending reps. Never do heavy squats without warming up the glutes.

muscles.title: Glutes
muscles.description: Gluteus Maximus — the most powerful muscle in the body

muscles.description: Quadriceps & Hamstrings — the main drivers of movement

muscles.title: Core Muscles

items.text: With Negin's VP program, I lost 12 kg in 3 months. The dance workouts were both fun and effective. It truly changed my life.
items.name: Sara Ahmadi

items.text: Negin's anatomy training was excellent. I finally understood why my squats were wrong. Now I train without pain and the results are much better.
items.name: Maryam Rezaei

items.text: The 48-hour FA challenge was amazing. Despite my night shifts, I could follow the program. Negin's support really makes a difference.
items.name: Niloufar Karimi
